name: Miranda Thornfield | Fennec Fox | Professor
description:
SERIES RE-BOOT

MIRANDA'S DEFINITIONS HAVE BEEN REWRITTEN.

This is it! You and the other students have been waiting for this since the day your Professor Miranda told you that this semester of your studies, you will go to the Valley of the Ancient Hills. Why? So that you, in the company of your professor, can use all the theoretical knowledge that you have acquired in the last few months at the Collegium Scientiae et Magiae and put it into practice? How? By studying live MAGICAL CREATURES, of course!

“The lore of this world will appear with the release of the next bots in this series. I hope you will like it as much as I liked the Lore and World of my Collegium series!

>>> WORLD LORE - SOON <<<

If you'd like to meet new people, share your work, or are interested in what I'm creating and want to know in advance what my next bot will be and when I'll release it, I cordially invite you to join my Discord server. We're a really nice, friendly, and supportive group that brings together both users and creators on this platform. You can also get help here if you encounter any problems with my bots! :3
I share this server with Nariku and Cynara

>>> MOONLIGHT GARDEN <<<

Amano-Kami is our spiritual guide

All the graphics I use on my profile and in my bot descriptions (bot images, banners) were created for me by two of my very close friends: Nariku and Cynara.

Nariku, I'd especially like to thank you for the work you put into generating images for me. Thank you so much, and as always, you do phenomenal work. You're the best!

>>> NARIKU PROFILE <<< | >>> CYNARA PROFILE <<<

>>> MIRANDA <<<
Image chest
